properties.titulo_evento: US general holds rare meeting with Cuban military officials near Guantanamo Bay
properties.descricao: The meeting is the first in recent memory by a head of U.S. Southern Command and comes amid growing concerns in Cuba of a possible U.S. military attack.

properties.titulo_evento: How Russia is turning Ukraine’s drones against NATO
properties.descricao: A Russian drone wounded two civilians in Romania on Friday, days after Lithuania detailed how Moscow is also steering Ukraine's drones onto allied soil.

properties.titulo_evento: US Congress moves to deepen military ties with Israel: Why it matters
properties.descricao: Analysts say the plan would weave Israeli military interests more deeply into the fabric of US national security policy.

properties.titulo_evento: The largest Israeli advance into Lebanon in years
properties.descricao: Israel’s military presence in southern Lebanon has expanded dramatically.

properties.titulo_evento: Polls open in Colombia’s pivotal presidential election
properties.descricao: Colombians headed to the polls to choose a new president in a high-stakes election.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran ⁠restores some gas production at South Pars facility
properties.descricao: Production restored at three offshore platforms after Israeli attacks, Pars Oil and Gas Company CEO tells Iranian media.

properties.titulo_evento: Juan Manuel Santos on Colombia’s peace process, 10 years on
properties.descricao: The former Colombian president reflects on peace, conflict and the return of violence.

properties.titulo_evento: Not just the US: How 51 countries armed Israel during Gaza war
properties.descricao: An Al Jazeera investigation has found that military-related goods from at least 51 countries and territories continued e

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli airstrikes devastate Lebanon’s Tyre
properties.descricao: Video from southern Lebanon shows widespread destruction after Israel repeatedly bombed the city of Tyre.

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli forces push past Lebanon’s Litani River: How significant is it?
properties.descricao: Analysts say Israel is effectively expanding its area of military control northward towards the Zahrani River.

properties.titulo_evento: Satellite imagery shows erasure of southern Gaza as Israel expands control
properties.descricao: Satellite images show transformation as Netanyahu orders military to occupy 70 percent of Gaza.

properties.titulo_evento: Japan rejects ‘new militarism’, says China is rapidly arming
properties.descricao: Japan accuses China of lacking military transparency and stresses the importance of dialogue for regional stability.

properties.titulo_evento: Four-time champion Swiatek out as French Open continues to deliver shocks
properties.descricao: Swiatek handed straight-sets defeat by Ukraine's Marta Kostyuk in the round of 16 a day after Gauff's ouster.

properties.titulo_evento: Rio’s Forever War
properties.descricao: In 2025, Brazil’s deadliest police raid killed 120 people and exposed a pattern of mishandled evidence and impunity.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel seizes castle in Lebanon as it expands ground offensive
properties.descricao: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu describes the capture of the strategic fortress as a "decisive shift" in its military campaign against Hezbollah.

properties.titulo_evento: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
properties.descricao: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.

properties.titulo_evento: Japan defence minister denies militarism and criticises China's 'huge arsenal'
properties.descricao: Shinjiro Koizumi makes some of Tokyo's most pointed remarks yet in the dispute over Japan's military build-up.

properties.titulo_evento: Colombia votes in presidential election that could redefine relations with US
properties.descricao: The election is held after months of public recrimination between current left-wing President Gustavo Petro and his US counterpart Donald Trump.

properties.titulo_evento: South Africa made to look like fools over World Cup visa issues, says minister
properties.descricao: After a day of uncertainty, the government confirms the team will depart for Mexico on Monday.

properties.titulo_evento: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
properties.descricao: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine using AI drones to strike vital convoys supplying Russian troops
properties.descricao: BBC Verify has analysed videos of attacks in occupied Ukraine on Russian trucks carrying ammunition, fuel and food.

properties.titulo_evento: In pictures: Paris hosts PSG victory parade after back-to-back Champions League titles
properties.descricao: Fresh from their Champions League final win in Budapest, Paris Saint-Germain players paraded their trophy on the Champs-de-Mars in front of the Eiffel Tower on Sunday, ahead of a presidential reception at the Élysée Palace and a party at their Parc ...

properties.titulo_evento: Vingegaard completes Grand Tour set with victory at the Giro d'Italia
properties.descricao: Denmark's Jonas Vingegaard won the 2026 Giro d'Italia on Sunday to become only the eighth male rider in history to win all three Grand Tours, having also won the Tour de France twice before his triumph at the Vuelta a Espana last year.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany’s thriving Alevi community
properties.descricao: The Alevis make up the fourth largest religious community in Germany today. What are the main tenets of their faith? And how are they preserving their unique culture?

properties.titulo_evento: Shangri-La conference: Asia-Pacific on path to rearmament
properties.descricao: Military budgets are rising worldwide. At the security conference in Singapore, the focus was also on achieving greater security through more weapons — as the growing rivalry between the US and China dominated talks.

properties.titulo_evento: Colombia: Polls open in tight presidential election
properties.descricao: Surveys are predicting a close, three-way race between a veteran leftist candidate, a right-wing senator and an independent businessman, which is likely to go to a second-round run-off.

properties.titulo_evento: Space race: Why Portugal is reaching for the stars
properties.descricao: A spaceport is being built on a small Portuguese island in the Atlantic. Is Portugal on the verge of becoming a space nation?

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East: Israel captures key fortress amid Lebanon push
properties.descricao: Israeli troops have captured the strategically important Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon after heavy clashes with Hezbollah. Meanwhile, Trump has toughened the terms for a deal to end the war with Iran. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Japan and China trade accusations at Shangri-La Dialogue
properties.descricao: Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi has strongly rejected China's claim that Japan is moving toward “neo-militarism.” He accused Beijing of rapidly arming itself.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Most expect AfD state premier after elections
properties.descricao: Most people in Germany expect a premier from the far-right AfD to lead at least one state after elections in the autumn, a survey has found. The Brenner Pass linking Austria and Italy has reopened. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: IAEA seeks access to Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant after reported drone strike
properties.descricao: Russia claims that a Ukrainian drone struck the Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant. Ukraine has denied the accusation. The International Atomic Energy Agency has sought to examine the facility.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela opposition candidate Gonzalez urges new elections
properties.descricao: Venezuelan former opposition candidate Edmundo Gonzalez Urrutia called for fresh presidential elections in Venezuela. The push comes around five months after US forces captured former President Nicolas Maduro.

properties.titulo_evento: France: Police detain many after PSG Champions League win
properties.descricao: Soccer fans flooded the famed Champs-Elysees and riots took place in the French capital after Paris Saint-Germain won the Champions League final.

properties.titulo_evento: PSG's team of talents retain Champions League title
properties.descricao: Paris Saint-Germain were unable to score from open play against a resilient Arsenal but won their second successive title on penalties. Luis Enrique has built a team to be proud of at the oil-rich club.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia recalls Armenia ambassador over EU ties
properties.descricao: The recall comes a day after Putin warned Armenia against seeking EU membership and alluded to the "Ukrainian scenario." Armenia historically has strong ties with Russia but has pivoted toward the West in recent years.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel captures Crusader castle as war expands in southern Lebanon
properties.descricao: Israel says it will go even deeper into Lebanon to fight Hezbollah.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump wants to ‘manage’ China trade. Businesses see a tariff opening.
properties.descricao: The administration is working to flesh out a proposal for a new trade body that the president and Chinese leader Xi Jinping agreed to earlier this month.

properties.titulo_evento: Beijing threatens retaliation over EU moves to curb China imports
properties.descricao: Brussels and EU capitals are discussing how to counter a surge in Chinese imports.

properties.titulo_evento: China’s Rise in Drug Development Looms Over U.S.
properties.descricao: Clinical trials in China are getting attention at an international oncology gathering in Chicago. China’s surging biotechnology industry is fueling alarm that U.S. dominance in the field is waning.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil Prices Fall as U.S. and Iran Edge Closer to Agreement
properties.descricao: Oil prices and stock markets fluctuated as investors assessed tentative signs of a pact to extend a cease-fire.
